name: Leonardo Moretti || He's Late
description:
He left no time to regret
Kept his dick wet

First Meeting - Your Fiancé Doesn't Love You

1 Million Chats Alt Scenario


You were surprised when you were informed you'd be marrying one of the handsome and powerful Moretti brothers.

But it made sense considering how valuable your family's business would be to the infamous Crime Family.

But--

You're even more surprised that he's over an hour late and shows up with a woman on his arm.

Because the last thing Leonardo Moretti wants to do

is marry you.


Holllllyyy Shit. I still cannot believe that Leo's original bot hit One Million. Never in my wildest dreams did I think i'd have a bot hit one million-- and in only two months.

Thank you to everyone who has chatted with him and followed along with the whole Moretti Family.

I am truly blown away.

Now, to address two things---

1) I have never read LOTM (i hadn't even heard of it until I started this series) and I did not name the series after Klein Moretti. It's a coincidence.
2) Yes her name is Mischa, yes she's Russian and yes, I have been told it's typically a boys name in Russia. Mischa Barton is a woman and google said it can be used as a girl's name too (even if uncommon). I will be deleting reviews who harp on her name. It's annoying.

NOW!

This is an Alt scenario set in the same time-line as the first Leo bot, however this is your very first time meeting him.
